markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on integration pages and discuss a new publication idea for Webflow developers](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Integration pages will live on Webflow.com/integrations, designed to be a hub for both app and custom code integrations](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [A new developer-focused blog/publication will be created, likely on developers.webflow.com](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Design approval processes need to be established for both new properties](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Content strategy should avoid duplication between developer content and existing blog articles](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)

## Topics

### Integration Pages Structure and Location

  - [Will be housed at Webflow.com/integrations](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Designed as a hub for both app installations and custom code integrations](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Should cater to visual designers stretching into development and full-stack developers](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Will link to marketplace apps, custom code examples, and potentially Webflow Cloud for deeper integrations](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Design inspiration to be drawn from the existing marketplace, maintaining consistency for user experience](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)

### Content Strategy for Integration Pages

  - [Focus on comprehensive coverage of integration options](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Include use cases to improve user engagement and reduce bounce rates](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [Ensure content is SEO-optimized while prioritizing user intent](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Differentiate from existing app pages to avoid cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Plan to set up redirects from outdated University articles to new integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)

### Developer-Focused Publication

  - [Proposed new blog/publication targeting developers, separate from the main Webflow blog](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=2120.0)
  - [Likely to be housed on developers.webflow.com for SEO benefits and faster implementation](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=2621.0)
  - [Content to focus on developer-centric topics, avoiding overlap with existing blog content](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=2120.0)
  - [Will help position Webflow as a developer-friendly platform, not just a design tool](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=2126.0)

### Content Differentiation and SEO Considerations

  - [Developer content should be distinctly technical, catering to a developer audience](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=2434.0)
  - [Avoid duplicating efforts between developer content and main blog articles](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=2295.0)
  - [Ensure proper canonicalization to prevent SEO conflicts](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=2621.0)
  - [Consider long-term strategy for potentially moving to Webflow.dev domain in the future](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=2662.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create designs for integration pages and developer publication, adhering to Webflow's design guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
  - [Establish approval process for designs with Webflow's design team](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
  - [Begin generating content for integration pages and developer publication articles](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=2727.0)
  - [Set up a meeting between Jason and Vivian to discuss SEO strategy in detail](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=2813.0)
  - [Develop a plan for migrating and redirecting relevant content from University to new integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
  - [Determine the workflow for content approval and publication on the new properties](https://fathom.video/share/c2fuSoyjZt9C7sysTdxx1zYbpn__fvy-?tab=summary&timestamp=2847.0)
